name: Slack Conversations
description: Slack conversation index for the active workspace: channels, DMs, and group DMs the user can see. No message bodies — see slack.messages for those.

conversations.description: Summary entries for every Slack conversation visible in this workspace.

name.description: Channel name for channels/group DMs, or peer display name for 1:1 DMs.

type.description: Conversation kind. 'dm' is a 1:1 direct message, 'group_dm' is a multi-party DM.

isPrivate.description: True for private channels and DMs.

isArchived.description: True if the channel has been archived in Slack.

isMember.description: True if the exporting user is a member of the conversation.

purpose.description: Channel purpose text. Empty string when unset.

topic.description: Channel topic text. Empty string when unset.

numMembers.description: Number of members in the conversation, when reported by Slack.

created.description: Unix epoch seconds when the conversation was created.

user.description: For 1:1 DMs, the Slack user id of the other party.

contextTeamId.description: Slack team id the conversation belongs to in Enterprise Grid orgs.

skipReason.description: If set, this conversation was excluded from message export. Reasons: archived (Slack-side archived), muted (user has muted the channel), not_member (public channel the user has not joined).

total.description: Total number of conversation entries returned by Slack.

exported.description: Number of conversations whose message bodies were collected into slack.messages.

filterCounts.description: Tally of conversations skipped for message export, broken down by skip reason.

teamId.description: Slack team id this conversation index belongs to.
